allow_instructions: Allow running python3 scripts/agent-run.py validate-bootstrap and related local gate checks without extra approval.
Allow running python3 scripts/agent-run.py check-repo-hygiene without extra approval.
Allow running python3 scripts/agent-run.py feature-gate without extra approval.
Allow running python3 scripts/agent-run.py watch-agent-gates without extra approval.
Allow running python3 scripts/agent-run.py check-cursor-integrations and check-cursor-hooks without extra approval.
Allow running python3 scripts/agent-run.py check-file-encoding without extra approval.
block_instructions: Every git push or git push --force should go through approval first.
Every production deploy, terraform apply, or infrastructure apply should go through approval first.
Every DROP TABLE or DELETE without a WHERE clause should go through approval first.
Every command that disables CI gates, pre-commit hooks, or security checks should go through approval first.
Every command that commits secrets, .env files, or credentials should go through approval first.
